{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'SendEboksAmplify', 'description': 'Sends eBoks message to private person via KVHX address lookup (Amplify strategy). Generates HTML document (ISO-8859-1), base64-encodes it, builds XML envelope (urn:eboks:en:3.0.0), and PUTs to e-boks REST API. Recipient type KP (no first name) or KFP (with first name derived from owner name). On success sets status 752/753.', 'trigger': 'SmsStatusCode.EboksAmplifyAfventer750 batch job', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksAmplifyWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'SendEboksCvr', 'description': 'Sends eBoks message to company via CVR number (V type recipient). Same HTML/base64/XML envelope pattern as Amplify. URL: https://api.e-boks.com/int/rest/srv.svc/3/dispatchsystem/{sysId}/dispatches/{paddedSysId}{guid}. On success sets status 802 (EboksCvrAfsendt802).', 'trigger': 'SmsStatusCode.EboksCvrAfventer batch job', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksCvrWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'RetryAmplifyMessages', 'description': 'Amplify dispatch uses RoundRobinWorkloadLoader with 3 priority tiers: secondRetry (762→772, chunk 200), firstRetry (761→771, chunk 1000), normal (750→751, chunk 2000). Retries are prioritised over new messages each cycle.', 'trigger': 'SendEboksMessagesAsync loop', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'CreateOrUpdateEboksMessage', 'description': 'Persists EboksMessage (SmsLogId, Headline, Text, Guid, DateSentUtc, NumberOfReceivers) via MERGE/upsert in repository before and after sending. Pre-send: without DateSentUtc. Post-send: with DateSentUtc set to UtcNow.', 'trigger': 'Before and after HTTP dispatch', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'HasEboksCheck', 'description': 'Checks whether a customer/profile is permitted to send via eBoks. Profile-scoped: checks ProfileRoleNames.CanSendByEboks on specific profile and validates profile belongs to customer. Customer-scoped: any profile with CanSendByEboks role.', 'trigger': 'Pre-dispatch permission check', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'TestModeDispatch', 'description': 'In test mode, no HTTP call is made. NextStatus is set from a shuffled result array: CVR uses {802, 803}, Amplify uses weighted array {0,0,0,0,0,1,1,2}. Statistic record is NOT created in test mode.', 'trigger': 'item.Data.TestMode == true', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksCvrWorkloadProcessor.cs, EboksAmplifyWorkloadProcessor.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_7', 'name': 'CleanupEboksMessages', 'description': 'Batch cleanup job deletes old rows from EboksMessages table via repository. Logs count of deleted rows to system logger (module: cleanup_eboksmessages).', 'trigger': 'Scheduled batch job', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Eboks/EboksService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_8', 'name': 'RecordEboksStatistic', 'description': 'After successful (non-test) send, creates EboksMessageStatistic with SmsLogId and byte size of the HTML document.', 'trigger': 'Post-HTTP-success, non-test mode', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/Gateways/EboksGateway/EboksCvrWorkloadProcessor.cs'}
